about_paragraph: Russel's Automotive, Inc. has been a family-owned fixture on Woolsey Road in Hampton, GA since 1971. From everyday repairs and ASE-certified diagnostics to brakes, suspension, and full engine work, the team handles cars and trucks of all makes. What sets the shop apart is its complete in-house machine shop — a precision capability few local repair shops can offer — letting them tackle engine and component machining most others have to send out. The promise is simple: honest answers, fair pricing, and work that holds up.
